mainEntity.name: Taiwan Stock Radar 是什麼？ What is Taiwan Stock Radar?

acceptedAnswer.text: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個面向台灣股票研究的雙軌產品。v1.7 會以 shared core 同步服務每日 08:30 日盤報告、單股委員會、CLI 與 Windows desktop app。 Taiwan Stock Radar is a dual-track Taiwan-stock research product. In v1.7, one shared core powers the daily 08:30 brief, the single-stock committee, the CLI, and the Windows desktop app.

mainEntity.name: 多 Agent 指標委員會如何運作？ How does the multi-agent indicator committee work?

acceptedAnswer.text: 系統會把趨勢、動能、量價、籌碼、基本面、事件、風控、策略選擇與驗證拆成不同 specialist 角色，先分別形成觀點，再由主持 agent 做權重整合與衝突裁決；同一套流程也會被 Windows desktop 直接呼叫。 The system separates trend, momentum, price-volume, chip-flow, fundamentals, events, risk, strategy-selection, and validation roles, lets them form independent views, and then asks a chair agent to synthesize the final verdict. The Windows desktop app calls the same workflow directly.

mainEntity.name: 為什麼需要不同專業的 AI personas？ Why use multiple specialist personas?

acceptedAnswer.text: 不同 specialist 角色可以降低單一觀點偏誤，讓趨勢、資金流、商業品質、事件時點與風險被分開檢視。 Multiple specialist personas reduce single-view bias by separating structure, flow, business quality, timing, and risk.

mainEntity.name: 最終輸出有哪些欄位？ What does the final output include?

acceptedAnswer.text: 標準輸出包含 signal-engine summary、style profile、策略模組選擇、驗證面板、base/bull/bear 三情境、建議買入區、進場條件、停損、停利階梯、失效條件、信心分級與 dissent memo。 A standard output includes the signal-engine summary, style profile, strategy-module selection, validation panels, base/bull/bear scenarios, preferred buy zone, entry triggers, stop-loss, take-profit ladder, invalidation, confidence, and dissent notes.

mainEntity.name: Taiwan Stock Radar 會保證績效嗎？ Does it guarantee performance?

acceptedAnswer.text: 不會。Taiwan Stock Radar 僅供研究、教育與產品展示使用，不保證投資報酬。 No. Taiwan Stock Radar is for research, education, and product demonstration only. It does not guarantee investment performance.
